query:
-- Pass 2a: Match via phone_numbers table
-- phone_numbers has serviceExternalId which links to services.externalId
-- Find unmatched services whose phoneNumber (normalised) matches a phone_number record
-- that has a serviceExternalId pointing to a matched service

UPDATE services AS u
JOIN phone_numbers AS pn 
  ON REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(pn.phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '+61', '0') 
   = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(u.phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '+61', '0')
JOIN services AS matched 
  ON matched.externalId = pn.serviceExternalId
  AND matched.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL 
  AND matched.customerExternalId != ''
SET u.customerExternalId = matched.customerExternalId
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.phoneNumber IS NOT NULL AND u.phoneNumber != ''
  AND u.phoneNumber NOT LIKE '%Unknown%';

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS rows_updated;

-- Find unmatched services whose phoneNumber (normalised) matches a phone_number record
-- that has a serviceExternalId pointing to a matched service

UPDATE services AS u
JOIN phone_numbers AS pn 
  ON REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(pn.phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '+61', '0') 
   = REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(u.phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '+61', '0')
JOIN services AS matched 
  ON matched.externalId = pn.serviceExternalId
  AND matched.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL 
  AND matched.customerExternalId != ''
SET u.customerExternalId = matched.customerExternalId
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.phoneNumber IS NOT NULL AND u.phoneNumber != ''
  AND u.phoneNumber NOT LIKE '%Unknown%';

SELECT ROW_COUNT() AS rows_updated;
